en.title: Khatm-e-Khwajagan
en.intro: Khatm-e-Khwajagan is a special collective dhikr performed in the Chishti tradition.

structure.title: Structure of Khatm
structure.text:
1. SURAH FATEHA (SURAH NO. 1) - 1 TIME
2. SURAH EKHLAS (QUL HO WAL LA HO AHAD - SURAH NO. 112) WITH BISMILLAH - 3 TIMES
3. DAROOD SHARIF - 3 TIMES
4. SURAH FATEHA (SURAH NO. 1) - 7 TIMES
5. DAROOD SHARIF - 101 TIMES
6. SURAH ALAM NASHRAH (SURAH NO. 94) - 79 TIMES (21 TIMES)
7. SURAH EKHLAS (QUL HO WAL LA HO AHAD - SURAH NO. 112) WITH BISMILLAH - 1010 TIMES (101 TIMES)
8. SURAH FATEHA (SURAH NO. 1) - 7 TIMES
9. ALLAH HUMMA YA QADIAL HAJAAT - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
10. YA KAFIAL MOHIMMAAT - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
11. YA DAFEAL BALIAAT - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
12. YA RAFEAD DARAJAAT - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
13. YA SHAFEAL AMRAADH - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
14. YA HALLAL MUSHKILAAT - 101 TIMES (21 TIMES)
15. YA GIASAL MUSTAGISIN - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
16. YA KHAYRUN NARSIREEN - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
17. YA MUJIBAD DAWAAT - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
18. YA MUFAT TEHAL ABWAAB - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
19. YA MUSAB BEBAL ASBAAB - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
20. BE RAHMATEKA YA ARHAMAR RAHIMEEN - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
21. YA MUHAMMAD MUSTAFA MUSHKIL KHUSHA SAL LAL LA HO ALAI HE WA SALLAM YA MUHAMMAD - 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
22. YA KHWAJA MOINUDDIN MOINUL HAQ AL MADAD BE IZNILLAH YA MOINUDDIN- 101 TIMES 21 TIMES
23. SURAH MUZAMMIL SURAH NO. 73 - 1 TIME
24. DAROOD SHARIF - 101 TIMES
25. SURAH FATEHA SURAH NO. 1 - 1 TIME
26. SURAH EKHLAS QUL HO WAL LA HO AHAD - SURAH NO. 112 WITH BISMILLAH - 3 TIMES
27. DAROOD SHARIF ALLAH HUMA SALLE ALLAH MUHAMMADIN WA LA AALE MUHAMMAD - 3 TIMES
28. LAHAULA WALA QUWATA ILLAH BILLAH HIL ALI-IL AZIM - 505 TIMES (51 TIMES)
29. DAROOD SHARIF - 101 TIMES
30. PRAY FOR YOUR HEART'S DESIRES

masters.title: The Khwajagan
masters.text: The Khwajagan are the spiritual chain of the Chishti order, beginning from Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti (Garib Nawaz).

hinglish.title: Khatm-e-Khwajagan
hinglish.intro: Khatm-e-Khwajagan ek khaas ijtimai dhikr hai jo Chishti riwayat mein ada kiya jaata hai.

structure.title: Khatm ki Tarteeb
structure.text:
1. Surah Al-Fatiha ki tilawat
2. Ayat-ul-Kursi
3. Surah Al-Ikhlas (3 baar)
4. Nabi ﷺ par salawat
5. "La ilaha illallah" ka dhikr
6. Khwajagan ke liye dua
7. Aakhri dua

masters.title: Khwajagan
masters.text: Khwajagan Chishti silsile ki ruhani zanjeer hain, jo Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti (Garib Nawaz) se shuru hoti hai aur aage ke buzurgon tak jaari rahi.

urdu.title: ختم خواجگان
urdu.intro: ختم خواجگان ایک خاص اجتماعی ذکر ہے جو چشتی روایت میں ادا کیا جاتا ہے۔

structure.title: ختم کی ترتیب
structure.text:
۱. سورہ الفاتحہ کی تلاوت
۲. آیت الکرسی
۳. سورہ الاخلاص (۳ بار)
۴. نبی ﷺ پر صلوات
۵. "لا الہ الا اللہ" کا ذکر
۶. خواجگان کے لیے دعا
۷. آخری دعا

masters.title: خواجگان
masters.text: خواجگان چشتی سلسلے کی روحانی زنجیر ہیں، جو خواجہ معین الدین چشتی (غریب نواز) سے شروع ہوتی ہے اور آگے کے بزرگوں تک جاری رہی۔
